svg.text: EVAL GATE (runs before every merge & deploy)
Golden transcripts & cases → expected outputs · self-verification + judge pass · PASS: merge / deploy · FAIL: regenerate with critique · no deploy without passing evals

svg.text: ① MCP-first — every capability is a tool; build once, surface everywhere.
② Skills-as-configuration — encode client rules as SKILL.md packs, not bespoke code.
③ Eval-gated — golden cases gate every change; no deploy without passing evals.
④ Tiered autonomy & trust by design — T1/T2/T3, guardrails & PII baked into every agent.
⑤ Production-grade — observability, cost & reliability before handoff; systems, not demos.
⑥ Built to hand off — client owns the IP; runbooks to run1; feeds the 1 Suite & Launchpads.
